'''âsh-p-b''' ('''shashapab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nangry|nangry]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nangry|nangry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| shashapab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishapab|thishapab]] || [[word:jishapab|jishapab]] || [[word:shishapab|shishapab]] || [[word:kishapab|kishapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushapab|thuthushapab]] || [[word:jujushapab|jujushapab]] || [[word:shushushapab|shushushapab]] || [[word:kukushapab|kukushapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushapab|thushapab]] || [[word:jushapab|jushapab]] || [[word:shushapab|shushapab]] || [[word:kushapab|kushapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushapab|thushapab]] || [[word:jushapab|jushapab]] || [[word:shushapab|shushapab]] || [[word:kushapab|kushapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshapab|theshapab]] || [[word:jeshapab|jeshapab]] || [[word:sheshapab|sheshapab]] || [[word:keshapab|keshapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshapab|thothoshapab]] || [[word:jojoshapab|jojoshapab]] || [[word:shoshoshapab|shoshoshapab]] || [[word:kokoshapab|kokoshapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshapab|thoshapab]] || [[word:joshapab|joshapab]] || [[word:shoshapab|shoshapab]] || [[word:koshapab|koshapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshapab|thoshapab]] || [[word:joshapab|joshapab]] || [[word:shoshapab|shoshapab]] || [[word:koshapab|koshapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshapab|thĂŠshapab]] || [[word:jĂŠshapab|jĂŠshapab]] || [[word:shĂŠshapab|shĂŠshapab]] || [[word:kĂŠshapab|kĂŠshapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashapab|thathashapab]] || [[word:jajashapab|jajashapab]] || [[word:shashashapab|shashashapab]] || [[word:kakashapab|kakashapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashapab|thashapab]] || [[word:jashapab|jashapab]] || [[word:shashapab|shashapab]] || [[word:kashapab|kashapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashapab|thashapab]] || [[word:jashapab|jashapab]] || [[word:shashapab|shashapab]] || [[word:kashapab|kashapab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashapab|shashapab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashapab|goshashapab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashapab|gokishashapab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashapabnĂŒ|shashapabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashapabnknĂŒ|goshashapabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapabnĂŒ|gokishashapabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashapabshĂ«|shashapabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashapabnkshĂ«|goshashapabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashapabshĂ«|gokishashapabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapabro|shashapabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapabnkro|goshashapabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapabro|gokishashapabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapabmu|shashapabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapabnkmu|goshashapabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapabmu|gokishashapabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashapabsher|shashapabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashapabnksher|goshashapabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashapabsher|gokishashapabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashapabng|shashapabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashapabnkng|goshashapabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashapabng|gokishashapabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashapabya|shashapabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashapabnkya|goshashapabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashapabya|gokishashapabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashapabyam|shashapabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashapabnkyam|goshashapabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashapabyam|gokishashapabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapabnĂŒshĂ«|shashapabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashapabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashapabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapabnĂŒro|shashapabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapabnknĂŒro|goshashapabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapabnĂŒro|gokishashapabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapabnĂŒmu|shashapabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapabnknĂŒmu|goshashapabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapabnĂŒmu|gokishashapabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapabshĂ«nĂŒ|shashapabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashapabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashapabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapabshĂ«ro|shashapabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapabnkshĂ«ro|goshashapabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapabshĂ«ro|gokishashapabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapabshĂ«mu|shashapabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapabnkshĂ«mu|goshashapabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapabshĂ«mu|gokishashapabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapabronĂŒ|shashapabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapabnkronĂŒ|goshashapabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapabronĂŒ|gokishashapabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapabroshĂ«|shashapabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapabnkroshĂ«|goshashapabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapabroshĂ«|gokishashapabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapabromu|shashapabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapabnkromu|goshashapabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapabromu|gokishashapabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapabmunĂŒ|shashapabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapabnkmunĂŒ|goshashapabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapabmunĂŒ|gokishashapabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapabmushĂ«|shashapabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapabnkmushĂ«|goshashapabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapabmushĂ«|gokishashapabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapabmuro|shashapabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapabnkmuro|goshashapabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapabmuro|gokishashapabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
